title: [codereview-pass-2] draft-lichen-schc-lora-00.md: Rule 1 global IPv6 sends 32B addresses making 41B total; impractical for LoRa MTU. Appendix A.1 claims 12-14B - reconcile with better prefix/context rules per 03-adaptation.md P2
description: Global traffic via BR should leverage known mesh prefix for source and perhaps destination prefix info from RPL or BR. Current value-sent for full addresses defeats SCHC benefits. Update table to use equal/not-sent for prefixes where possible and document the compressed size accurately. See SCHC RFC 8724 Section 10 for LPWAN examples.
